description: Use this API to calculate the impact of transaction events on MW flows using a linear network (dc) model. This API routine was first introduced in release 29.0.0. ierr = impc(event, dfxfile, atcfile)

parameters.name: event
parameters.description: Transaction event number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: dfxfile
parameters.description: Name of dfax data file. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: atcfile
parameters.description: Name of atc updates file; blank for none. (input; blank by default).

error_codes.description: no name of DFAX data file specified.
file DFXFILE is not in the form of a PSSE-25 or later DFAX file; run DFAX.
no monitored branches or interfaces defined.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
